basic_details.job_title: PAU Teaching/Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Chowkidar, Beldar and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) Various Teaching/Non-Teaching Posts Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website www.pau.edu. A total of vacancies have been announced (post-wise distribution as per official notification) under the PAU Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.all_posts_fee: Refer to the advertisement for specific fees per post

age_limit.age_details: For Sr. No. 7-10: Min 18, Max 37. Upper age limit relaxed up to 45 years for Govt. employees. For other posts, age determined as on 1st January of the year of advertisement.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, M.Sc., Ph.D research and related projects are considered. For Group-C and Group-D posts, Punjabi language proficiency is required.
qualification.details: Additional Director of Research (Agriculture, Horticulture & Forestry): Qualifications vary. Additional Director of Extension Education: Qualifications vary. Silviculturist: Qualifications vary. Assistant Professor (Statistics): Qualifications vary. M.Sc., Ph.D research and related projects are considered. Assistant Professor (Microbiology): Qualifications vary. M.Sc., Ph.D research and related projects are considered. Assistant Professor (Punjabi): Qualifications vary. M.Sc., Ph.D research and related projects are considered. Farm Manager (Plant Tissue Culture): Qualifications vary. Store Keeper: Qualifications vary. For Group-C and Group-D posts, Punjabi language proficiency is required. Beldar (Ludhiana/Outstation): Qualifications vary. For Group-C and Group-D posts, Punjabi language proficiency is required. Chowkidar: Qualifications vary. For Group-C and Group-D posts, Punjabi language proficiency is required.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the PAU Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of PAU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PAU Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the PAU Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download PAU Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PAU Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Scrutiny of application forms Examination/Prescribed test (where applicable) Interview (for shortlisted candidates)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the PAU Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of PAU to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for PAU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application submission and fee payment is 30 July 2026. The hard copy of the application along with documents must also be submitted by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for PAU posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification varies by post. For Assistant Professor posts, M.Sc. and Ph.D. are considered. For Group-C and Group-D posts, proficiency in the Punjabi language is required. A graduate degree is the minimum for some positions.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for the PAU Various Teaching/Non-Teaching Posts?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official PAU website. The application process involves filling out the form, depositing the fee, and submitting a hard copy of the application with supporting documents.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for PAU recruitment?
faq.answer: For posts Sr. No. 7-10, the age limit is 18 to 37 years. Government employees can get an age relaxation up to 45 years. For other posts, the age is determined as of January 1st of the advertisement year.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for PAU jobs?
faq.answer: The application fee details are not explicitly mentioned in the summary. Candidates are advised to refer to the official advertisement for specific fee information per post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves scrutiny of application forms, followed by an examination or prescribed test (if applicable), and an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary range for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary scales range from Rs. 18,000/- (Level-01) for Group-D posts to Rs. 1,44,200/- (Level-14) for Group-A posts, with additional allowances.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type mentioned is 'Contract'.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct download link for the official notification PDF will be available in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Punjab Agricultural University?
faq.answer: The official website of Punjab Agricultural University is www.pau.edu.
